Scowtt Appoints Abhishek Priya as Head of Engineering to Advance AI Innovation in Customer Acquisition Scowtt, the AI-native customer acquisition platform, today announced the appointment of Abhishek Priya as its first Head of Engineering, solidifying the company's founding leadership team and accelerating the next phase of product innovation. Abhishek will lead engineering and technical strategy, with a focus on scaling Scowtt's proprietary AI platform for CRM-driven marketing and autonomous sales.
